text: Now I'll count the matching items across all three systems in a single query:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' AND title ILIKE '%SSO SCIM provisioning%') AS sentry_unresolved,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM linear_issues WHERE state NOT IN ('done', 'canceled') AND title ILIKE '%SSO SCIM provisioning%') AS linear_not_done,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'open' AND title ILIKE '%SSO SCIM provisioning%') …(+20)
